truth_boundary: External scraper output is evidence only. Public posting fields must still come from deterministic source modules, raw fixtures, expected fixtures, parser tests, source-quality gates, and Postgres/Meili parity.

repositories.name: firecrawl/firecrawl
repositories.boundary: Detail markdown and extracted text are evidence only; deterministic source fixtures and parsers remain truth.

repositories.name: unclecode/crawl4ai
repositories.boundary: Self-hosted crawler output can guide parser work, but cannot populate public fields directly.

repositories.name: scrapy/scrapy
repositories.boundary: Useful crawler architecture reference; Python stack is not the default OpenJobSlots runtime path.

repositories.name: ScrapeGraphAI/Scrapegraph-ai
repositories.boundary: AI extraction is research evidence only because OpenJobSlots must preserve evidence-vs-truth separation.

repositories.name: apify/crawlee
repositories.boundary: Best fit for an optional Node-side rendered/detail fetch path behind source caps and fixtures.

repositories.name: lorien/awesome-web-scraping
repositories.boundary: Research catalog only; tools still need license, safety, and fixture-backed review before use.

repositories.name: kalil0321/ats-scrapers
repositories.boundary: Provider methods are useful research; do not vendor code without license and correctness review.

phases.name: research-to-backlog-map
phases.goal: Convert external scraper and ATS method research into repo-local targets that preserve the existing source-module contract.

phases.name: method-profile-and-experiment-runner
phases.goal: Expose source method profiles and make read-only method experiments work beyond the current narrow source allowlist.

phases.name: pilot-source-hardening
phases.goal: Apply the method map to the first high-value existing and expansion ATS lanes with raw fixtures and quality gates.

phases.name: external-evidence-provider-sidecar
phases.goal: Add optional rendered or markdown evidence providers only after deterministic parser truth remains enforced.

targets.current_gap: Repo certification notes still call for stable raw source certification beyond brittle HTML card parsing.
targets.recommended_action: Research a stable endpoint or fixture-backed HTML method, then add source method profile and raw/expected/invalid fixtures.

targets.current_gap: Large live field-gap source where list pages often need bounded detail evidence.
targets.recommended_action: Use method profiles to compare list, paged iframe, and bounded detail fetch evidence without weakening parser gates.

targets.current_gap: Certified but high live geo/remote gaps; repair requires polite detail-page evidence, not generic scraping.
targets.recommended_action: Profile Output.asp list fetch versus bounded detail fetches and keep detail output as fixture-backed parser evidence.

targets.current_gap: Not configured in this repo, but existing docs already identify it as a Wave 1 expansion candidate.
targets.recommended_action: Add a new source only after endpoint review for the public XML feed, raw XML fixture, expected normalized fixture, and invalid-shape fixture.

targets.current_gap: Not configured; repo docs list Trakstar Hire / Recruiterbox as a Wave 1 candidate.
targets.recommended_action: Review public frontend openings API, define tenant discovery, then certify source ids, canonical URLs, geo, date, and remote behavior.

targets.current_gap: Not configured; repo docs list Workable as a Wave 2 candidate because public token/config handling needs review.
targets.recommended_action: Do not implement until public widget/API token handling is documented and fixture-backed.

targets.current_gap: Repo canonical source is saphrcloud; external methods use SuccessFactors naming.
targets.recommended_action: Treat as alias research for saphrcloud, not a new ATS family.

targets.current_gap: Certified source exists, but tenant site/language variants remain a known enterprise risk.
targets.recommended_action: Use method profiles to capture site/language/pagination variants before broader promotion.

targets.current_gap: Certified source exists, but pagination and detail-description variants remain open.
targets.recommended_action: Benchmark source method variants and add pagination/detail fixtures before throughput expansion.
Use as the positive direct-JSON control when method profiles are added.

targets.current_gap: Already strong direct JSON baseline; pagination variants still useful.
targets.recommended_action: Use as a second direct-JSON control and add skip/limit fixture variants when touched.

targets.current_gap: Not configured and not in the immediate repo expansion list.
targets.recommended_action: Keep as research-only until configured source demand exists.
